creator: kristinacors
caption: If you love Emily in Paris and all of the filming locations for this Netflix Show, you’ll love this series! #travelbucketlist #parisfrance #emilyinparis #parisfashionweek #parisitinerary

transcription.text: Emily in Paris filming locations in Paris. Watch until the end for the name and address. You may remember this spot featured on Emily in Paris on season 4 episode 3, where Emily and Mindy have a wine date. If you're in Paris, it's a cafe you can actually visit. It's in the 6th ARR. It's open from 8am till midnight, so it works for coffee, lunch, or late night drinks. They serve classic French dishes, seafood, and cocktails, and the interiors feel very old-world Paris with a modern edge. By the way, if you're looking for more hidden gems with this aesthetic, check out my 7-day itinerary for Paris. It includes four spots a day, it includes walk times and drive times, so you don't have to think about logistics. It's linked in my bio and you can grab it for the price of a cocktail. The name of this spot is Cafe La Paris, and this is the address. Follow for part 2, where I share more filming locations for Emily in Paris, and comment if you watch Emily in Paris on Netflix, and let me know what location I should do a video about next. Share with your travel buddy!
